description_long: This is a dark wooden filing cabinet with three spacious drawers, each featuring a rectangular metallic handle centered on the drawer front. The cabinet has a slightly trapezoidal profile, with the front face wider than the back, giving it a modern, sturdy appearance. The wood grain is visible throughout, lending a rich, natural texture to the surface. The sides and top are plain, with no additional features or hardware visible. The handles are sleek and metallic, contrasting with the deep brown wood finish. This cabinet is designed for practical storage and would fit well in a professional or home office environment.
description: A dark wood filing cabinet with three drawers and metallic handles, featuring a modern, trapezoidal design and visible wood grain.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers with metallic handles and the full width of the cabinet.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain wooden surface and the depth of the cabinet.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless wooden back panel, slightly narrower than the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the plain wooden surface and depth seen in view 1.
